title: Senior Software Engineer - Shaadi.com - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Shaadi.com - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shaadi.com family as a Senior Software Engineer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shaadi.com:
Shaadi.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com!
